description: Choose one of the following writing tasks and write your answer in about 100 words.

tasks.title: A café review
tasks.prompt: You see this notice on an English-language website.||Reviews wanted!||A café near you||Write a review of a café you know.||Say what the food and service are like and whether you would recommend it.||Write your review.
tasks.modelAnswer: The Blue Cup Café||The Blue Cup Café is a small café near my school. I went there last Saturday with two friends, and we all enjoyed it. The café is modern and comfortable, with large windows and quiet music.||The food was very good. I had a cheese sandwich and a chocolate cake, which were both fresh and tasty. The drinks were not too expensive either. The service was friendly, although we had to wait a few minutes because the café was busy.||I would recommend The Blue Cup Café to students because it is a nice place to relax after school.

tasks.title: Story
tasks.prompt: Your English teacher has asked you to write a story.||Your story must begin with this sentence:||I was walking home when I suddenly heard somebody calling my name.||Write your story.
tasks.startingSentence: I was walking home when I suddenly heard somebody calling my name.
tasks.modelAnswer: I was walking home when I suddenly heard somebody calling my name. I turned round and saw my old friend Daniel, who had moved to another city two years before. I was really surprised to see him.||He told me he was visiting his grandparents for the weekend and had hoped to meet me. We decided to go to a café and talk. He told me about his new school, and I told him about my football team.||Before he left, we promised to stay in contact. It was a short meeting, but it made me very happy.
